summary: At 66131d96a869fc317519a66c13ea0e3b0b8d3e1d, the one-command closure remains a callback-injected run-session policy: it adds no new run-session-to-CLI reverse dependency, does not duplicate predecessor connector/review ownership, and improves target-model conformance from origin/main's 81 violations to 80.
inspection_summary: Inspected all 28 changed tracked paths across Design SSOT/target model, predecessor and closure Stories, Architecture/Spec/replay/test plan, CLI/session/action-owner/runtime/review modules, scope-boundary task inference, and their changed tests. For core_workflow_state, checked the closed action DAG, current-HEAD rebind, repair suffix replay, typed capability/human stops, review provenance and final Gate binding. The target model places the new owner and production connectors in run-session; guarded-run-session composes callback boundaries, while cli.js remains the outer composition root. Conformance reports 80 current violations versus 81 for origin/main. Its pre-existing undeclared run-session -> cli edge count is 9 on both sides, so no new reverse edge was introduced.
inspection_evidence: HEAD verified with git rev-parse HEAD. Current conformance command exited 0 and reports 80 violations; the recorded origin/main comparison is 81, with run-session -> cli edge_count=9 in both artifacts. Focused core workflow command exited 0: node --test test/guarded-run-session.test.js test/safe-action-orchestrator.test.js test/independent-review-orchestrator.test.js test/scope-boundary-gate.test.js test/e2e/story-vibepro-one-command-pr-ready-closure-runtime.spec.ts. Focused adapter/connector/owner command exited 0 with 61/61: node --test test/agent-runtime-adapter.test.js test/agent-runtime-connectors.test.js test/one-command-pr-ready-closure.test.js.
judgment_delta: Initial concern: adding the closure owner, runtime composition, and review runner could introduce a new run-session-to-CLI reverse dependency. Final judgment: one-command-pr-ready-closure.js has callback-only boundaries and no CLI import; conformance shows the pre-existing run-session -> cli count remains 9 on both current and origin/main, not a new edge.

Initial concern: the closure could reimplement the completed connector or independent-review predecessor Stories. Final judgment: production connector ownership remains in agent-runtime-connectors.js and review lifecycle/verdict ownership remains in independent-review-orchestrator.js; guarded-run-session composes both, while the new module owns only policy and action callbacks.

Initial concern: core_workflow_state changes could bypass current-HEAD Gate authority or skip verify/review after repair. Final judgment: the safe-action and guarded-session tests plus the public E2E cover typed stops, cancellation, current-HEAD rebind, repair suffix replay, separate review provenance, and final_prepare's current Gate check; no bypass was found.

Initial concern: the lower current conformance total could conceal a new violation. Final judgment: current is 80 versus origin/main 81, with unchanged 66 undeclared-dependency and 5 budget categories and one fewer orphan file; the reviewed change does not worsen the baseline.
